blockers.description: BULLETIN-COMPILE-OUTPUT-CHANNEL - the Editor-Agent stores the BulletinDraft JSON in a Paperclip issue document + comments prose; deliverAgentTask reads listComments for a JSON comment, so nothing publishes. The gap Plan 03-07 (Option C) fixes.
blockers.workaround: Option C - agent delivers via a submit-compile-result plugin tool

blockers.description: DURABLE-BREAKER-STALE-HISTORY - isCircuitOpenDurable reads pre-fix editor_agent_failures rows, so a fresh install is silently DOA until stale rows are cleared. Non-blocking operability follow-up.
blockers.workaround: Cleared by hand during the drill. Plan 03-07 could fold in a reset-on-install or version-scoped failure count.

human_actions_pending.action: Uninstall the 03-06 build from Countermoves: cd ~/paperclip && pnpm paperclipai plugin uninstall clarity-pack
human_actions_pending.context: The 03-06 build is still installed and the compile-bulletin job fires every minute, creating operation issues + Editor-Agent runs with no publish. Uninstall to halt the loop. Data preserved (no --purge).

human_actions_pending.action: After Plan 03-07 auto tasks are built: reinstall on Countermoves and re-run the Phase 3 closure drill
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 3 cannot close without a passing live drill - host-faithful fakes model host constraints, not agent behaviour.

decisions.decision: Scoped-issue task delivery (Plan 03-06) - the compile job creates an off-board operation issue assigned to the Editor-Agent, NOT a ctx.agents.sessions.sendMessage call
decisions.rationale: The host discards the session prompt (upstream PR #3106, open). Proven working on the 2026-05-16 re-drill.

decisions.decision: Option C for result-readback (Plan 03-07) - the Editor-Agent hands the BulletinDraft back by calling a declared plugin tool (submit-compile-result)
decisions.rationale: Canonical plugin-llm-wiki pattern; typed return, no poll/timeout/JSON-from-prose extraction; governance-faithful.

context_notes: Phase 3 auto/TDD work is 100% done and green (suite 676 / 674 pass / 0 fail / 2 skip). The ONLY thing between here and a closed Phase 3 is the output-channel fix (Plan 03-07, Option C) plus one more Countermoves drill. The 2026-05-16 re-drill PROVED the hard part: the scoped-issue handoff works, the Editor-Agent runs scoped to the operation issue (PAPERCLIP_TASK_ID confirmed) and produces a flawless BulletinDraft. KEY LESSON: host-faithful test fakes model host CONSTRAINTS not agent BEHAVIOUR - any agent-invocation change MUST be verified by a live drill.
